Core services

Specialized solutions for residential homes — no shortcuts, just honest work and clear communication.

01

Heating

Furnace installation, repair & maintenance. Keeping Ottawa families warm through every winter since 2008.

Learn more→
02

Air conditioning

Central AC, ductless mini-splits, and seasonal tune-ups. Stay cool and efficient all summer.

Learn more→
03

Air quality

Filtration, humidifiers, UV purifiers & duct cleaning. Cleaner air for your family year-round.

Learn more→

The Ottawa HVAC
PROS difference

Same-day service available

When your furnace or AC breaks down, we move fast. Same-day appointments available across Ottawa and Orléans.

Upfront, honest pricing

You see the price before we start. No surprise invoices, no hidden fees — just straightforward service.

Licensed & fully insured

All technicians are licensed, insured, and trained to Ontario standards. Your home is protected.

Our commitment

Pros only.

Verified clients

“I've had this company in my home several times over the years and each time they have been honest and professional. They've also gone out of their way to make sure things were fixed quickly — even on Christmas Eve. Would highly recommend.”

— Damion Fusco

2 months ago

“Joel and team are incredible. They installed a new AC unit and later a new furnace, and I couldn't be happier. Joel is completely honest — he won't sell you something you don't need, answers questions day or night, and made sure I understood exactly what was wrong. I will always recommend this company.”

— Chantale Raymond

3 years ago

“Joe and his team are amazing! Got back to us quickly, completed the work fast, respected the quote, and left everything clean and tidy. Highly recommend.”

— Kristy Hardiman

4 years ago
